# Prestige Electric

> Family-owned and operated electrical service company serving the greater Kansas City metropolitan area. Licensed electricians, upfront flat-rate pricing, and a lifetime craftsmanship warranty.

Prestige Electric provides electrical service upgrades, panel replacements, hot tub wiring, breaker box upgrades, electrical repair, and troubleshooting for homeowners and businesses in Belton, Lee's Summit, Overland Park, Leawood, Lenexa, Olathe, and nearby Kansas City metro communities.

## Contact

- Phone: (816) 548-9601
- Email: Prestigeelectric01@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (America/Chicago)
- Location: Belton, Missouri (serving the greater Kansas City metro)
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrestigeElectricKC

## Key pages

- [Home](https://prestigeelectricco.com/): Kansas City electrician overview, services, service area, and request form
- [Contact](https://prestigeelectricco.com/contact.html): Request a quote or schedule service
- [See Our Work](https://prestigeelectricco.com/our-work.html): Completed electrical projects across the Kansas City metro

## Services

- [Electrical Service Upgrades](https://prestigeelectricco.com/services/service-upgrades.html): Increase electrical capacity for additions, workshops, EV chargers, and modern appliances
- [Panel Replacements](https://prestigeelectricco.com/services/panel-replacements.html): Replace outdated or unsafe electrical panels
- [Breaker Box Upgrade](https://prestigeelectricco.com/services/breaker-box-upgrade.html): Upgrade breaker panels for safety and capacity
- [Hot Tub Wiring](https://prestigeelectricco.com/services/hot-tubs.html): Code-compliant hot tub and spa electrical installation
- [Electrical Repair](https://prestigeelectricco.com/services/electrical-repair.html): Outlets, switches, lighting, and general electrical repairs
- [Electrical Troubleshooting](https://prestigeelectricco.com/services/troubleshooting.html): Diagnose flickering lights, tripping breakers, and power issues

## Service areas

- [Belton, MO](https://prestigeelectricco.com/locations/belton-mo.html)
- [Lee's Summit, MO](https://prestigeelectricco.com/locations/lees-summit-mo.html)
- [Overland Park, KS](https://prestigeelectricco.com/locations/overland-park-ks.html)
- [Leawood, KS](https://prestigeelectricco.com/locations/leawood-ks.html)
- [Lenexa, KS](https://prestigeelectricco.com/locations/lenexa-ks.html)
- [Olathe, KS](https://prestigeelectricco.com/locations/olathe-ks.html)

## What makes Prestige Electric different

- Upfront flat-rate pricing before work begins
- Licensed and insured electricians
- Lifetime craftsmanship warranty on qualifying work
- Family-owned and operated, based in the Kansas City metro

## Common questions

- **What areas do you serve?** Belton, Lee's Summit, Overland Park, Leawood, Lenexa, Olathe, and nearby Kansas City metro communities.
- **Are you a 24/7 emergency service?** No. Hours are Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM. For life-safety emergencies, call 911 first.
- **How do I get a quote?** Call (816) 548-9601 or use the request form on the website.
